hero.tagline: You focus on the business. We
hero.subtitle: For founders who need a technical partner, not another agency.

howWeWork.label: How We Work
howWeWork.subtitle: You've probably been burned before. Here's how working with us is structurally different.
howWeWork.bottomTagline: We're a founder-led technical partner. Same team from day one to scale.

rows.ggit: Direct line to the people writing code

rows.category: What if the idea is bad?
rows.ggit: We tell you before you waste money
AU + BR coverage — progress while you sleep

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Your stage
services.subtitle: We don't sell hours or headcount. We meet you where you are and deliver what your business actually needs right now.

items.title: Discovery & Strategy
items.subtitle: You have an idea — we make it buildable
items.description: You know the problem you want to solve but not how to build it. We define your MVP scope, recommend the right tech stack, estimate costs, and deliver a clear roadmap your team (or investors) can trust.

items.title: MVP Build
items.subtitle: From zero to working product — fast
items.description: We build your first product in weeks, not months. No-code, low-code, or custom — whatever gets you to market fastest. You get a real product to put in front of users and investors.

items.title: Fractional CTO
items.subtitle: Technical leadership without the full-time cost
items.description: Ongoing strategic partnership. We make architecture decisions, oversee development, manage your dev team, and translate tech into business language for your stakeholders.

items.title: Scale & Migrate
items.subtitle: Your MVP worked — now make it handle growth
items.description: When your product outgrows its initial architecture, we re-engineer for scale. Migrate from no-code to custom, optimize performance, and build infrastructure that handles real traffic.

cta.title: Let's figure out your next step
cta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute call. No pitch, no pressure — just an honest conversation about what your startup needs right now.

footer.description: You focus on the business. We build the product. A founder-led technical partner bridging Australia and Brazil.

cookie.title: Your privacy matters
cookie.description: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. You can choose to accept or reject non-essential cookies.
